name: Crunchy Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6 1/2 Oz.) Solid White Tuna, packed in water, drained and flaked
1 can (8 Oz.) Water Chestnuts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and chill.
3. Line two plates with lettuce.
4. Spoon half of the tuna salad onto each plate. (May use low fat yogurt in place of mayonnaise.)
